name: Slack MCP
description: Post and read Slack messages, search channels, and manage threads via the Slack Web API.

envVars.name: SLACK_BOT_TOKEN
envVars.description: xoxb-... bot user token. Required scopes depend on the tools used.

envVars.name: SLACK_APP_TOKEN
envVars.description: xapp-... app-level token. Required for Socket Mode.

args.name: default-channel
args.description: Channel id used when a tool call omits an explicit channel.
